advisory.title: ASA-2024-001: Validation of VoteExtensionsEnableHeight can cause chain halt
advisory.description: CometBFT advisory ASA-2024-001 covers a chain-halt condition in validation of the VoteExtensionsEnableHeight consensus parameter. A governance proposal modifying this parameter on an ABCI 2.0 chain can trip the validator on the new value and panic the node. The v0.38.2..v0.38.3 patch (commit 5fbc97378, 'Merge pull request from GHSA-qr8r-m495-7hc4') strengthens validation in types/params.go. Affects v0.38.0, v0.38.1, v0.38.2; fixed in v0.38.3.

introducingCommits.subject: Vote extensions: add proto fields for enabling extensions (#9865)

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.38.2 release commit, the last vulnerable v0.38 release before the v0.38.3 patch. The introducing commit 0bc53992 added the original ValidateUpdate logic on ConsensusParams for VoteExtensionsEnableHeight — missing the negative-value check, missing the nil-`updated` guard, and with an incomplete state machine that allows the parameter to be disabled at a past height. The GHSA-qr8r patch (5fbc97378) rewrites exactly the function this commit introduced in types/params.go.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag insufficient validation of VoteExtensionsEnableHeight in types/params.go where a governance-driven parameter change can panic the node and halt the chain on ABCI 2.0 networks.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2024-001 (GHSA-qr8r-m495-7hc4) was published on 2024-01-18 with the patch in cometbft v0.38.3.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.38.2 release commit, the latest tag in the >=0.38.0,<=0.38.2 vulnerable range.
